title: Pink & White Plastic Piping Icing Bags, Pack of 20 (30 x 18 cm) - Easy To Use & Disposable, Ideal for Home Baking & Professional Use
features: VERSATILE BAKING ESSENTIAL: Elevate your baking with our pack of 20 Pink & white piping icing bags, each measuring 30 x 18 cm, perfect for crafting a wide range of confectionery creations, from cakes and buns to cupcakes and more.

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: Crafted from durable plastic, these icing bags are designed to handle various consistencies without tearing or bursting, ensuring a smooth, controlled piping experience every time.

CONVENIENT & DISPOSABLE: Say goodbye to messy cleanup with these easy-to-use, disposable icing bags. Spend more time enjoying your baking and less time washing up, making your baking experience hassle-free and enjoyable.

IDEAL FOR ANY OCCASION: Whether you're decorating treats for a birthday party, or wedding, or just sprucing up your weekend baking, these icing bags are the ideal tool to help you achieve stunning results.

SUITABLE FOR VARIOUS TYPES OF ICING: Whether you're using buttercream, royal icing, or whipped cream, these piping bags are suitable for a variety of icings and can handle different consistencies with ease.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality piping bags is desinged with a cone shape in clear durable plastic. Great for home baking or professionals. Ingredients Plastic Safety Warning No warning applicable See more
